title: Predictive Data Normalization
requirements: Map heterogeneous crawler outputs to the OMEGA Sovereign Schema.
Handle missing values using 'Regional Mean' imputation.
Sanitize all financial data to EGP/USD/SAR normalized units.
Compliance: Remove all PII during normalization to ensure Law 151 safety.

logic.archiving: Maintain lineage from factory/intake/raw/ to factory/intake/processed/.
